uplink.description: TTN example: single PM10 record (fPort 2 TLV).
uplink._note: Upstream decodes this header byte (0x0B = PM10) with len byte 0x88, value u16(0x01,0x00)=256, advancing the index past the buffer; only air.pm10 is produced. Satisfies particulate (air.pm10).

uplink.description: Full multi-sensor frame: all weather channels in TLV order.
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic frame exercising every sensor type. Expected values derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js: bat=1200/30=40 (raw, not volts), wind_speed=50/10=5 m/s level 5 (E), illumination=100*10=1000 lux, CO2=500 ppm, TEM=250/10=25 C, HUM=522/10=52.2 %, pressure=10000/10=1000 hPa, rain_gauge=20/10=2 mm, PM2_5=15, PM10=42, PAR=400, TSR=900/10=90 W/m2. Covers climate, weather-station, wind, rain-gauge, light, air-quality, particulate and solar-radiation.

0xFFCE = -50 via correct two's-complement (value - 0x10000), /10 = -5.0 C. Upstream's (value - 0xffff) would give -4.9 (off by one count, the documented dragino bug); this codec uses the correct conversion per AUTHORING.md.

Device-info uplink: firmware V.1.0.2, EU868 sub-band 0, battery u16(0x0B,0xB8)=3000/1000=3.0 V (this frame's battery IS in mV per upstream, unlike the fPort 2 `bat` field), sensor-types nibble string. No meteorological vocabulary keys; included for fidelity to the upstream fPort 5 branch.
Upstream returns errors:['unknown FPort'] for any port other than 2 or 5.
